name: Overgrown
desc: Thick grass, vines, or other growths cover this arena, making speed far more difficult.
engaged: _Speed_ Costs are increased by 1. Additionally, you have _Disadvantage_ to _Dodge_ or _Negate_ with _Reflex_.
destroy: A creature may Attack this _Terrain_; if they deal at least 3 _Slash_ Damage they may remove this from an _Engagement_. Any effects that Targets the whole Arena and does at least 8 _Slash_ Damage removes Overgrown from all _Engagements_.

name: Cliff
desc: This arena is a sheer cliff, difficult to climb with few handholds.
effect: While in this _Arena_ creatures may only move by _Climbing_. If you are _Forcibly Moved_ while in or into this _Arena_ from _High Ground_ you immediately _Fall_. Add the _Ledge_ _Terrain_ to whatever _Arena_ you climb into from this.

name: Gusting
desc: A powerful gust that lasts only a short while.
effect: When this Terrain is applied, remove any [_Cloud_] _Terrain_. Non-Melee Attacks that pass through, originate from this, or target a creature in this _Arena_ automatically decrease their Result by 1 unless they are [_Wind_] or [_Lightning_].

name: High Ground
desc: Elevated terrain that provides an advantage against other foes.
effect: You have a +1 on _Attack Rolls_ against creatures in lower Arenas and may treat yourself as 1 Range closer when attacking them.

name: Ledge
desc: The lip of a cliff, right next to a steep drop.
effect: While in this _Terrain_, you may be _Forcibly Moved_ to an adjacent _Arena_ even if it is not _Forceful_. This _Arena_ is typically specified.

name: Veiled
desc: Terrain filled with dust, smoke, mist, or some other obscuring agent.

name: Submerged
desc: An underwater position within the arena, providing great protection and the expense of the ability to breathe.
engaged: Gain _Cover_ and increase your _Resistance_ to _Fire_ by two steps. However, you are always _Swimming_ and _Suffocating_, and increase your _Weakness_ to _Lightning_ by two steps.

name: Egg Cluster
desc: A disgusting cluster of Locust Eggs.
engaged: Gain _Cover_. Locusts will not target you with Ranged Attacks.
destroy: When destroyed, all Locusts within Range 1 of the Egg Cluster become _Enraged_ and _Taunted_, and treat the character that Destroyed the Egg Cluster as the Taunter.

name: Stalactite
desc: A large rock, log, or some other.
effect: Only [_Flying_] creatures may _Engage_ this; if they do, they do not lose _Flying_.
destroy: When destroyed, this falls to the ground. Creatures in the _Arena_ must _Negate_ [_Reflex_ 8]; on a failure they are _Hit_, on a success they are instead _Grazed_. This is a [_Stab_, _Earth_] effect. Create four _Source_ 3 [_Earth_].

name: Oil
desc: A slick coat of oil covers this area, making passage difficult.
engaged: Speed_ Costs are increased by 1. Additionally, you have _Disadvantage_ to _Dodge_, _Negate_ with _Reflex_, and _Negate_ _Forced Movement_ or _Prone_.
interactions: If this _Terrain_ is _Ignited_, it automatically becomes _Roaring_ and rolls all end of round effects at _Advantage_.

name: Wet
desc: A puddle, slick ground, or other small source of water.
engaged: You have _Disadvantage_ to _Negate_ _Forced Movement_ and _Prone_. Additionally, increase your _Weakness_ to _Lightning_ by one step.
interactions: If this would become _Blazing_, instead remove _Wet_ and add _Veiled_.

name: Cramped
desc: A tight corridor that is difficult to fight in.
effect:
* All creatures and Obstacles in this Arena are always _Engaged_.
* _Heavy_ Attacks made while in this _Arena_ have _Disadvantage_.
* Attacks that pass through this _Arena_ have _Disadvantage_.

name: Icy
desc: A slick sheet of ice that makes it difficult to find footing.
enter: You are automatically _Grazed_. Do not apply _Engaged_ penalties to the _Negate_ roll.
engaged: _Speed_ Costs are increased by 1. Additionally, you have _Disadvantage_ to _Dodge_, _Negate_ with _Reflex_, and _Negate_ _Forced Movement_ or _Prone_.
interactions: If this _Engagement_ or a creature in it is targeted by a _Fire_ effect, this becomes _Wet_.

name: Tripping Hazard
desc: A low protrusion that, most of the time, is easily avoided, but could trip one forced into it.

name: Spikes
desc: Spikes, spines, or other terrain that can easily impale and shred others.

name: Blazing
desc: A burning fire, eager to spread.
engaged: If you end your _Turn_ _Engaged_, you are automatically _Hit_.
eor:
All _Engaged_ _Flammable_ _Obstacles_ lose 1 _Hardness_. Roll a d6, at _Disadvantage_ if this was not on _Flammable_ _Terrain_:
* **1-2:** Replace _Blazing_ with _Smoldering_.
* **3-4:** No change.
* **5-6:** _Ignite_ 1 random _Flammable_ _Engagement_ in Range 0, or the _Arena_ if _Flammable_. If the _Arena_ is Blazing, instead _Ignite_ a random _Flammable_ _Engagement_ in Range 1.
interactions: If this would become _Wet_, it becomes _Smoldering_ and _Wet_ is not applied.

name: Roaring
desc: A piece of terrain covered in intense, roiling flames.
engaged: If you end your _Turn_ _Engaged_, you are automatically _Hit_.
eor:
All _Engaged_ _Flammable_ _Obstacles_ lose 1 _Hardness_. Roll a d6, at _Disadvantage_ if this was not on _Flammable_ _Terrain_:
* **1-2:** Replace Roaring with _Blazing_.
* **3-4:** No change.
* **5-6:** _Ignite_ 1 random _Flammable_ _Engagement_ in Range 0, or the _Arena_ if _Flammable_. If the _Arena_ is Blazing, instead _Ignite_ a random _Flammable_ _Engagement_ in Range 1.
interactions: If this would become _Wet_, it becomes _Blazing_ and _Wet_ is not applied.

name: Smoldering
desc: The remains of what was once a fire.
engaged: If you end your _Turn_ _Engaged_, you are automatically _Hit_.
interactions: If this would become _Wet_, Smoldering is removed and _Wet_ is not applied. The _Terrain_ becomes _Veiled_.
